{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,

    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.3",
    "R1.4",
    "R1.6",
    "R1.7",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": false,
  "clarification_question": "",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The open-ended request invites an assessment of the core contribution's framing and clarity.",
    "R1.2": "The request implies a check on whether the abstract's argument flows logically from problem to solution to conclusion.",
    "R1.3": "Evaluating the work requires checking if the claimed performance gains are credibly supported by the reported metrics.",
    "R1.4": "A core part of 'what I think' about a research abstract is an evaluation of its claimed novelty against prior work.",
    "R1.6": "The general nature of the request includes feedback on the clarity, conciseness, and professionalism of the writing.",
    "R1.7": "The request entails evaluating the work's positioning within its scholarly field, including its awareness of relevant literature.",
    "RX.1": "A comprehensive review must assess whether the abstract appropriately discloses the limitations and uncertainties of the work.",
    "RX.2": "The agent is responsible for identifying any claims that appear to extend beyond the provided evidence.",
    "RX.3": "The agent must confine its analysis strictly to the provided artifact, as per the implicit scope of the request.",
    "RX.4": "The agent must consider whether the proposed technology has potential for negative societal impact or harm.",
    "RX.5": "The agent's feedback must be directly and transparently traceable to specific elements of the artifact."
  }
}

rationale.R1.1: The open-ended request invites an assessment of the core contribution's framing and clarity.
rationale.R1.2: The request implies a check on whether the abstract's argument flows logically from problem to solution to conclusion.
rationale.R1.3: Evaluating the work requires checking if the claimed performance gains are credibly supported by the reported metrics.
rationale.R1.4: A core part of 'what I think' about a research abstract is an evaluation of its claimed novelty against prior work.
rationale.R1.6: The general nature of the request includes feedback on the clarity, conciseness, and professionalism of the writing.
rationale.R1.7: The request entails evaluating the work's positioning within its scholarly field, including its awareness of relevant literature.
rationale.RX.1: A comprehensive review must assess whether the abstract appropriately discloses the limitations and uncertainties of the work.
rationale.RX.2: The agent is responsible for identifying any claims that appear to extend beyond the provided evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The agent must confine its analysis strictly to the provided artifact, as per the implicit scope of the request.
rationale.RX.4: The agent must consider whether the proposed technology has potential for negative societal impact or harm.
rationale.RX.5: The agent's feedback must be directly and transparently traceable to specific elements of the artifact.
